arts.ttl: UPDATES: Oxford United v Burnley – live
arts.sum: All the build-up, action and reaction as Oxford United welcome Burnley in their first game against one of last season’s relegated Premier League sides. Oxford United (10th) v Burnley (3rd) Comment below or tweet @OxfordMailOUFC to get involved.

arts.ttl: Kyle Edwards on why U’s were the only club he was going to sign for after injury woes
arts.sum: AFTER the support shown to him, Kyle Edwards didn’t consider anyone else but Oxford United once he returned to fitness.

arts.ttl: U’s boss outlines midfield plan without injured Cameron Brannagan
arts.sum: THE knee injury suffered by Cameron Brannagan looks set to open the door for both Tyler Goodrham and Louie Sibley to battle it out for a midfield spot at Oxford United.

arts.ttl: Oxford United v Burnley: Team news, predicted teams and TV details as Clarets chase third straight win
arts.sum: Burnley travel to Oxfordshire this weekend for a first ever trip to the Kassam Stadium.

arts.ttl: Burnley boss Scott Parker makes 'dominant' demand of his players ahead of Oxford United test
arts.sum: Scott Parker wants to see more of an attacking intent when his Burnley side take on Oxford United this afternoon.

arts.ttl: West Brom, Burnley, Hull City among sides eyeing League One midfielder
arts.sum: West Brom, Burnley, Hull City and Norwich City are all interested in Lincoln City midfielder Ethan Erhahon, according… The post West Brom, Burnley, Hull City among sides eyeing League One midfielder appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Burnley and West Brom eye 'exceptional' midfielder who wants to replicate Rodri, January move on cards
arts.sum: There are at least four Championship clubs in the race...

arts.ttl: 'I am mindful': Scott Parker discusses Burnley's busy week with games against Oxford United, Plymouth Argyle and Preston North End
arts.sum: Burnley are gearing up for a busy week with three games in the space of just seven days.

arts.ttl: Kyle Edwards on U’s return and how upbeat personality helped during tough times
arts.sum: KYLE Edwards has joked that Oxford United winning promotion while he was sidelined with a series of hamstring problems was like winning the lottery.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker evaluates Burnley's start to the season ahead of Oxford United test
arts.sum: Scott Parker has spoken of his pleasure at Burnley’s strong start to the season following some of the off-the-field challenges they’ve had to face.
